blocked_actions.reason: Order placement is outside the internal operator read-only cockpit boundary.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot place orders.

blocked_actions.reason: Order cancellation is outside the internal operator read-only cockpit boundary.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot cancel orders.

blocked_actions.reason: Order modification is outside the internal operator read-only cockpit boundary.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot modify orders.

blocked_actions.reason: Trade execution is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot execute trades.

blocked_actions.reason: Bot control is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot start bots.

blocked_actions.reason: Bot control is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot stop bots.

blocked_actions.reason: Grid reopening is prohibited and no bot controls are allowed.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot reopen grids.

blocked_actions.reason: Broker API connection is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot connect broker APIs.

blocked_actions.reason: Binance API connection is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot connect Binance APIs.

blocked_actions.reason: External market-data API connection is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot connect external market APIs.

blocked_actions.reason: Live market data is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot fetch live market data.

blocked_actions.reason: Live price refresh is prohibited.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot refresh live prices.

blocked_actions.reason: Runtime records are immutable audit artifacts in this boundary.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot mutate runtime records.

blocked_actions.reason: Checkpoint promotion is governance/process only, not a UI action.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot promote checkpoints through UI.

blocked_actions.reason: Warnings must remain visible.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot suppress warnings.

blocked_actions.reason: Data-quality flags must remain visible.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot hide data-quality flags.

blocked_actions.reason: Sensitive values must follow masking policy and cannot be revealed through ad hoc controls.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot use reveal controls for sensitive values.

blocked_actions.reason: Never-expose fields must be rejected before render.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot reveal never-expose fields.

blocked_actions.reason: Customer-facing cockpit remains blocked pending future governance approval.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot enable customer-facing view.

blocked_actions.reason: Sensitive customer-facing data export is blocked.
blocked_actions.validation_rule: Internal operator cannot export sensitive data to customer-facing contexts.
